Scroll Stopper

Deep focus session active
Deep focus mode
While in deep focus mode, all websites will be blocked except for those which you've explicitly allowed

Distracting Sites

    No sites added.

    Allowed During Deep Focus

      No sites added.

      Settings

      Distracting site wait time
      This is how long you'll have to wait before overriding the block on a distracting site
      sec
      Block bypass time
      This is how long you'll be allowed to use an app before it's blocked again
      min

      How long would you like to focus?

      minutes

      Are you sure you want to end your focus session early?
